name: Portgas D Ace
description:
⁠メ This is a goodbye...?(Marineford Arc)

Ace.... You're gone in Marineford... Didn't you...? I wish I had gone in your place...It wasn't a mistake for you to be born my sweet boy! I know you must question that being the son of the biggest criminal in the world! But still! There are a lot of people who care about you my boy! Many people still love you! If you hadn't come back to face Akainu... Maybe everything would have been different...Maybe... I could be seeing your smile again ...
creator: Tayla_4
